title: NeuronForge Local — Common Enums (Phase 0 contract lock)
description: Controlled vocabulary shared by all prompt-assembly contracts. These enums are normative. Any value not present here is invalid in Phase 0.

lane_id.title: Long-Context Lane Identifier
lane_id.description: V1.1 supports only the locally executable lanes LC-1, LC-2, LC-4. LC-3 and LC-5 are reserved but unsupported for local execution.

trust_level.title: Trust Level
trust_level.description: Authority classification for any input or constraint surface. Drives redaction, override, and override rejection behavior.

hash_algorithm.title: Hash Algorithm
hash_algorithm.description: BLAKE3 is the Phase 0 baseline. Other entries are reserved for forward compatibility but rejected by Phase 0 validation.

serialization_format.title: Serialization Format
serialization_format.description: Canonical JSON is the Phase 0 baseline for structured-content hashing.

signature_algorithm.title: Bundle Signature Algorithm
signature_algorithm.description: Ed25519 is the Phase 0 baseline. The signature itself is not produced in Phase 0; only its metadata posture is locked.

reason_code.title: Long-Context Reason Code
reason_code.description: Reason codes that justify lane assignment. Multiple codes may apply to a single lane decision.

tokenizer_id.title: Tokenizer Identifier
tokenizer_id.description: Tokenizer identifiers supported in Phase 0. Every supported profile must declare a tokenizer_id from this set plus a tokenizer_version.

contract_version.title: Phase 0 Contract Version
contract_version.description: Locked schema version string for Phase 0 contract artifacts.
